title: Elytra Break Pop
description: A visual warning when your elytra breaks, using the totem of undying animation.
body:
## Elytra Break Pop

You're flying. Everything's fine. Then you're **not flying anymore**.

No warning, no flash, nothing. Your elytra just quietly died and now you're plummeting at full speed wondering what went wrong. By the time you realize it, you're already taking fall damage.

**Elytra Break Pop** adds the one thing that should've been in the game from the start — when your elytra breaks, it triggers the totem of undying animation using the broken elytra itself. Loud, visual, impossible to miss. You'll know the exact moment it happens.

The mod is extremely lightweight. It runs a single check in the background and does nothing until your elytra actually breaks — which hopefully isn't that often. No config files, no settings menu, no performance impact worth mentioning. Just install it and forget it exists until the one moment it saves you from a very embarrassing death.

Client-side only. Works on any server without any server-side installation.

## Requirements

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
